title: Firestorm (disambiguation)
content:
'''Firestorm''' may refer to:

==Miscellaneous==
*[[Heat storm]]; a meteorological phenomenon on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]
*[[Firestorm (short story)|''Firestorm'']]; a short story written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]]
*[[Firestorm (plan)|Firestorm]], a plan by the Empire to eradicate the Rebel presence on Ord Mynock

==Vehicles==
*[[Firestorm (CR90 corvette)|''Firestorm'']]; a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that made up part of [[Lumiya]]'s [[Lumiya's fleet|fleet]]
*[[Firestorm (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Firestorm'']]; a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-aligned [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*[[Firestorm (Imperial-class)|''Firestorm'']]; an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that made up part of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Blitzer Harrsk|Harrsk's]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]

==Weapons and technology==
*[[Firestorm Turbolaser]]
*[[Firestorm-1]]; a type of [[Missile/Legends|missile]] launcher
*[[Firestorm 2]]; a type of [[Sublight drive|sublight]] [[Engine/Legends|engine]]

{{Disambig}}
